title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PANTALAN BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CARLES, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO TIBURCIO BETITA MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8896 / 62 OG No. 25, 4376 (June 20, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4294, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PANTALAN BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CARLES, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO TIBURCIO BETITA MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Pantalan Barrio School in the Municipality of Carles, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Tiburcio Betita Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
